languages.text: "Он мог спастись, но решил пожертвовать собой ради сектора. Самоотверженность — высшее проявление праведности".
"He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
languages.original_text: "Он мог спастись, но решил пожертвовать собой ради сектора. Самоотверженность — высшее проявление праведности".

traits.locale_text: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
"He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
"He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

languages.text: 「彼は自分自身を救うこともできたが、セクターのために犠牲になることを選んだ。無私無欲こそ正義の最高峰である」
languages.original_text: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は自分自身を救うこともできたが、セクターのために犠牲になることを選んだ。無私無欲こそ正義の最高峰である。」

languages.text: “他本可以自保，却选择为舱区赴死。无私，即是正义的最高体现。”
languages.original_text: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: “他本可以自保，却选择为舱区赴死。无私，即是正义的最高体现。”

languages.text: «Podría haber salvado su vida, pero decidió sacrificarse por el bien del sector. El altruismo es la mayor muestra de virtud».
languages.original_text: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: «Podría haber salvado su vida, pero decidió sacrificarse por el bien del sector. El altruismo es la mayor muestra de virtud».

languages.text: "Obwohl er sich hätte selbst retten können, hat er sich für den Sektor geopfert." Selbstlosigkeit ist der höchste Ausdruck von Rechtschaffenheit."
languages.original_text: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: "Obwohl er sich hätte selbst retten können, hat er sich für den Sektor geopfert." Selbstlosigkeit ist der höchste Ausdruck von Rechtschaffenheit."

languages.text: « Au lieu de sauver sa propre vie, il a choisi de se sacrifier pour le secteur. L'abnégation est la plus éminente expression de la vertu. »
languages.original_text: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: « Au lieu de sauver sa propre vie, il a choisi de se sacrifier pour le secteur. L'abnégation est la plus éminente expression de la vertu. »

languages.text: "Kendini kurtarabilirmiş ama sektör için kendisini feda etmeyi seçmiş. Özveri, doğruluğun en yüksek ifadesidir."
languages.original_text: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."

traits.locale_text: "Kendini kurtarabilirmiş ama sektör için kendisini feda etmeyi seçmiş. Özveri, doğruluğun en yüksek ifadesidir."
